meta.title: LifeCareLog — Turning life records into services
meta.description: A one-person dev studio making small, useful tools for everyday life

hero.headline:
Building things
people actually need,
one at a time.
hero.subheadline:
LifeCareLog is a one-person dev studio making small, useful tools for everyday life.
From calculators to legal search to mental wellness — building useful things, one by one.

about.title: The maker
about.description:
Hi, I'm a full-stack developer with 5 years across multiple startups.

After leaving my last startup, I decided to build useful services on my own.
From planning to design, development, and deployment — it's slow going solo,
but every decision is mine, and every feature is intentional.

Building a brand where small, useful services add up to something meaningful.

planC.title: Plan-C
planC.subtitle: Calculators
planC.description: The calculators you reach for most — all in one place.

planL.title: Plan-L
planL.subtitle: Legal Search
planL.teaser: AI searches Korean statutes and explains them in plain language.

planT.title: Plan-T
planT.subtitle: AI Mental Wellness
planT.description: A mobile app for checking in with yourself, every day.

coffeeChat.headline: Let's grab a (virtual) coffee
coffeeChat.description:
30 minutes, no agenda needed.
Tech questions, startup ideas, or just curious — all good.

contact.headline: Send me a message
contact.subheadline: I read everything. Usually reply within 2 days.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Got it. I'll be in touch soon.
contact.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
contact.errorEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email address.
contact.privacy: Your information is only used to respond and is never shared.

notFound.title: Nothing here yet
notFound.description: Maybe when we get to Plan-Z.
